data: Revise how to make small talk with colleagues at work

message: Let's revise how to make friendly small talk with colleagues at work.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"It has been [adjective] lately — how are you managing [situation]?"

This warm and natural structure helps you start conversations and show that you care about your colleagues.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/2ae64bdf-bb3c-4528-8205-c06f6d52888d-51.-Workplace-Small-Talk.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/2ae64bdf-bb3c-4528-8205-c06f6d52888d-51.-Workplace-Small-Talk.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to make small talk with a returning colleague

1.Where were you for so many days? We had to do all the work without you.
2.It has been a bit overwhelming lately — how are you managing the team transitions?

Correct answer: 2

Select the correct way to start a friendly office conversation

1.It has been quite exciting lately — how are you managing all the new responsibilities?
2.This month has had a lot of changes and I am not happy with most of them.

Correct answer: 1
It&&has&&been quite&&demanding lately&&— how&&are&&you managing the&&client&&expectations?
It&&has&&been extremely&&productive lately&&— how&&are&&you managing your&&time&&so&&well?
It&&has&&been a&&bit&&overwhelming lately&&— how&&are&&you managing the&&team&&transitions?

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. You meet a colleague during a coffee break. How do you start a friendly conversation?'

'2. You see a colleague you have not spoken to in a while. How do you break the ice?'

'3. You are waiting for a virtual call to start. How do you make small talk with a colleague?'

'4. You meet your manager in the elevator. How do you start a quick friendly chat?'

'5. A team member just returned from a long trip. How do you start a warm conversation?'"
